title: pilosella macrocyma
intro: Pilosella macrocyma, also known as Alpine Mouse Ear, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family native to high mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pilosella macrocyma include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Pilosella macrocyma is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
